mechanism: ROIC-WACC spread compression to 3.5-5.0pp creates nonlinear fragility: 100bp WACC increase destroys 25% of EVA at 4pp spread vs 12.5% at 8pp spread. This means rate shock pathway (pathway a) would have 2.5x larger impact than in 2017-19 conditions.
regime_dependence: Fragility increases as spreads compress. Current 3.5-5.0pp spread (with ±50bp uncertainty) is the tightest since pre-GFC. Would widen if AI capex delivers sufficient ROIC improvement.
